title: MOSSEL BAY FIRES: No more donations needed in the field, municipality thanks all
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  No more donations are needed in the field following the fire in Aalwyndal, Vakansieplaas, Island View and surrounding areas.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - No more donations are needed in the field following the fire in Aalwyndal, Vakansieplaas, Island View and surrounding areas."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality said overwhelming support has been received from the community and it thanked every person who made a contribution, especially towards keeping those in the field on their feet as they battled during firefighting efforts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It also thanked EMS Chaplaincy “for their astounding commitment manning the refreshment and rehabilitation station at the Mossel Bay Airfield and carefully coordinating aid given”.","html":"It also thanked EMS Chaplaincy “for their astounding commitment manning the refreshment and rehabilitation station at the Mossel Bay Airfield and carefully coordinating aid given”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The station ran its last session at 13:00 this afternoon, Sunday, 11 January, and closed down afterwards.","html":"The station ran its last session at 13:00 this afternoon, Sunday, 11 January, and closed down afterwards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Excess donations will be moved to the sorting warehouse where other volunteers have been working around the clock to ensure donations are processed.","html":"Excess donations will be moved to the sorting warehouse where other volunteers have been working around the clock to ensure donations are processed."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Anyone wishing to offer support with sorting, can report to the Generosity Pay-it-forward store at 3 Watson Street, Voorbaai."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In terms of residents affected by the fires, the municipality said enough clothing donations had been received.","html":"In terms of residents affected by the fires, the municipality said enough clothing donations had been received."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality encouraged those who still wanted to donate, to consider making a financial contribution to support the families affected. According to the municipality a dedicated platform has been created for donations.","html":"The municipality encouraged those who still wanted to donate, to consider making a financial contribution to support the families affected. According to the municipality a dedicated platform has been created for donations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Donations can be paid to:Eden Protocol FoundationBank: FNBCheque Account: 6301 834 9670Branch: 250 655Reference: Fire and your name","html":"Donations can be paid to:
Eden Protocol Foundation
Bank: FNB
Cheque Account: 6301 834 9670
Branch: 250 655
Reference: Fire and your name"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Eden Protocol Foundation is a registered and compliant non-profit organisation with full governance oversight.Registration No: 2022 / 697383 / 08Tax No: 9287366257PBO No: 930077977Section 18A Status: Donations qualify for a tax deductionFor further assistance and information contact Lucinda Laing at 044 606 5000 or email [email protected] (during office hours from Monday 12 January).","html":"The Eden Protocol Foundation is a registered and compliant non-profit organisation with full governance oversight.
Registration No: 2022 / 697383 / 08
Tax No: 9287366257
PBO No: 930077977
Section 18A Status: Donations qualify for a tax deduction
For further assistance and information contact Lucinda Laing at 044 606 5000 or email [email protected] (during office hours from Monday 12 January)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
